mapper.sql: id, name, cover_image, CAST(images AS CHAR) as images, region, address, latitude, longitude, category, taste, price, CAST(description AS CHAR) as description, CAST(recommended_dishes AS CHAR) as recommended_dishes, open_time, phone, tags, rating, CAST(highlights AS CHAR) as highlights, CAST(craft AS CHAR) as craft, is_recommended, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, delete_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM foods WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO foods (name, cover_image, images, region, address, latitude, longitude, category, taste, price, description, recommended_dishes, open_time, phone, tags, rating, highlights, craft, is_recommended, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{coverImage}, #{images}, #{region}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{category}, #{taste}, #{price}, #{description}, #{recommendedDishes}, #{openTime}, #{phone}, #{tags}, #{rating}, #{highlights}, #{craft}, #{isRecommended}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE foods SET name = #{name}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, images = #{images}, region = #{region}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, category = #{category}, taste = #{taste}, price = #{price}, description = #{description}, recommended_dishes = #{recommendedDishes}, open_time = #{openTime}, phone = #{phone}, tags = #{tags}, rating = #{rating}, highlights = #{highlights}, craft = #{craft}, is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE foods SET is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
